title: centaurium littorale var. turneri
intro: Centaurium littorale var. turneri, also known as Centaury or Mountain Centaury, is a variety of the Centaurium littorale plant, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the gentian family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and is used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and respiratory infections. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Centaurium littorale var. turneri can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusion, tincture, or decoction, allowing for its medicinal properties to be extracted and utilized for therapeutic purposes.
